conservative.name: Sudden Knife
conservative.requirements: Target within close range. Not visibly armed or target does not suspect you of being an enemy

success.description: You produce a dagger or similar weapon as if by magic and hit the target for normal damage
As above, and the target may not move closer to you on its next turn

boon.description: Your attack is very subtle. Characters further than close range must pass Average (2d)Observation (Int) checks to notice that you made an attack

bane.description: Your attack is very obvious and clearly visible to all characters within long range
